hooks.command: GENKI_HOOK_ID=deny_nested_agent; input=$(cat); if printf '%s\n' "$input" | grep -Eq '"agent_id"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]+"'; then printf '%s\n' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Nested subagent creation is disabled: a subagent cannot spawn another Agent."}}'; fi
